sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A kipatcil a om ka Pasian
Pasian Van misiang te phatden Pasian.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (Na kilawm hi Topa)2 Na kilawm phat dingin Topa

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Huihpi leh tuihual daisak thei Pa,
Lungkham buaina teng vengsak thei Pa,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tapa khat neihsun a hongpia Pa,
Ka suahtak nang lam honghon sak Pa,
